---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for MarketplaceSucks
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem Description

A clear description of the problem or frustration this feature would address.

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

A description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Module Affected

Which part of the extension does this relate to? (e.g., Filters, UI, Popup, Content Script, Background Service, Options Page)

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
